thank_you_card.title: 🎮 Demo Election - Thank You
thank_you_card.body1: Thank you for participating in this demo election. Your vote is an important part of the democratic process.
thank_you_card.body2: All votes are kept anonymous and secure throughout the process.

receipt.title: 🧾 Your Vote Receipt
receipt.subtitle: Keep this receipt for your records.

demo_info.title: 🎮 Demo Election Mode
demo_info.body: This is a test election. You can vote multiple times for testing and demonstration purposes.

security.title: Secure & Anonymous
security.body: All votes are recorded anonymously and securely encrypted.
